dataset_name: TalentGrid company open roles validation seed
important_warning: Active openings are dynamic and were not fully live-counted in this generated file. Null counts are intentional to avoid false job counts. Use the validator script to populate current counts.

open_roles_count_semantics.active_openings_count: Count of active job postings returned by a verified API or validated job portal at validation time.
open_roles_count_semantics.null_means: Not yet live validated, not zero.
open_roles_count_semantics.zero_means: Live validation succeeded and source returned zero active postings.

recommended_pipeline: map source_name and api_url for ATS where possible
group active jobs by company for card counts
